meaning: vt.出价,投标,祝愿,命令,吩咐n.出价,投标v.支付
examples: The bank announced its intention to bid.
Granada mounted a hostile takeover bid for Forte.
Hanson made an agreed takeover bid of $351 million.
Some Tajiks would like to see their own man, Mohammed Fahim, make a bid for power.
In a bid to stem disorder, city pubs shut for two hours after the game.
